verses.text: الٓرۚ تِلۡكَ ءَايَٰتُ ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ وَقُرۡءَانٖ مُّبِينٖ
verses.translit: Aliflamra tilka ayatu alkitabi waquranin mubeenin
verses.translation: Alif, Lam, Ra. These are the verses of the Book and a clear Qur'an

verses.text: رُّبَمَا يَوَدُّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ لَوۡ كَانُواْ مُسۡلِمِينَ
verses.translit: Rubama yawaddu allatheena kafaroo law kanoo muslimeena
verses.translation: Perhaps those who disbelieve will wish that they had been Muslims

verses.text: ذَرۡهُمۡ يَأۡكُلُواْ وَيَتَمَتَّعُواْ وَيُلۡهِهِمُ ٱلۡأَمَلُۖ فَسَوۡفَ يَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.translit: Tharhum yakuloo wayatamattaAAoo wayulhihimu alamalu fasawfa yaAAlamoona
verses.translation: Let them eat and enjoy themselves and be diverted by [false] hope, for they are going to know

verses.text: وَمَآ أَهۡلَكۡنَا مِن قَرۡيَةٍ إِلَّا وَلَهَا كِتَابٞ مَّعۡلُومٞ
verses.translit: Wama ahlakna min qaryatin illa walaha kitabun maAAloomun
verses.translation: And We did not destroy any city but that for it was a known decree

verses.text: مَّا تَسۡبِقُ مِنۡ أُمَّةٍ أَجَلَهَا وَمَا يَسۡتَـٔۡخِرُونَ
verses.translit: Ma tasbiqu min ommatin ajalaha wama yastakhiroona
verses.translation: No nation will precede its term, nor will they remain thereafter

verses.text: وَقَالُواْ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِي نُزِّلَ عَلَيۡهِ ٱلذِّكۡرُ إِنَّكَ لَمَجۡنُونٞ
verses.translit: Waqaloo ya ayyuha allathee nuzzila AAalayhi alththikru innaka lamajnoonun
verses.translation: And they say, "O you upon whom the message has been sent down, indeed you are mad

verses.text: لَّوۡمَا تَأۡتِينَا بِٱلۡمَلَـٰٓئِكَةِ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ
verses.translit: Law ma tateena bialmalaikati in kunta mina alssadiqeena
verses.translation: Why do you not bring us the angels, if you should be among the truthful

verses.text: مَا نُنَزِّلُ ٱلۡمَلَـٰٓئِكَةَ إِلَّا بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَمَا كَانُوٓاْ إِذٗا مُّنظَرِينَ
verses.translit: Ma nunazzilu almalaikata illa bialhaqqi wama kanoo ithan munthareena
verses.translation: We do not send down the angels except with truth; and the disbelievers would not then be reprieved

verses.text: إِنَّا نَحۡنُ نَزَّلۡنَا ٱلذِّكۡرَ وَإِنَّا لَهُۥ لَحَٰفِظُونَ
verses.translit: Inna nahnu nazzalna alththikra wainna lahu lahafithoona
verses.translation: Indeed, it is We who sent down the Qur'an and indeed, We will be its guardian

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ أَرۡسَلۡنَا مِن قَبۡلِكَ فِي شِيَعِ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ
verses.translit: Walaqad arsalna min qablika fee shiyaAAi alawwaleena
verses.translation: And We had certainly sent [messengers] before you, [O Muhammad], among the sects of the former peoples

verses.text: وَمَا يَأۡتِيهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا كَانُواْ بِهِۦ يَسۡتَهۡزِءُونَ
verses.translit: Wama yateehim min rasoolin illa kanoo bihi yastahzioona
verses.translation: And no messenger would come to them except that they ridiculed him

verses.text: كَذَٰلِكَ نَسۡلُكُهُۥ فِي قُلُوبِ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمِينَ
verses.translit: Kathalika naslukuhu fee quloobi almujrimeena
verses.translation: Thus do We insert denial into the hearts of the criminals

verses.text: لَا يُؤۡمِنُونَ بِهِۦ وَقَدۡ خَلَتۡ سُنَّةُ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ
verses.translit: La yuminoona bihi waqad khalat sunnatu alawwaleena
verses.translation: They will not believe in it, while there has already occurred the precedent of the former peoples

verses.text: وَلَوۡ فَتَحۡنَا عَلَيۡهِم بَابٗا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ فَظَلُّواْ فِيهِ يَعۡرُجُونَ
verses.translit: Walaw fatahna AAalayhim baban mina alssamai fathalloo feehi yaAArujoona
verses.translation: And [even] if We opened to them a gate from the heaven and they continued therein to ascend

verses.text: لَقَالُوٓاْ إِنَّمَا سُكِّرَتۡ أَبۡصَٰرُنَا بَلۡ نَحۡنُ قَوۡمٞ مَّسۡحُورُونَ
verses.translit: Laqaloo innama sukkirat absaruna bal nahnu qawmun mashooroona
verses.translation: They would say, "Our eyes have only been dazzled. Rather, we are a people affected by magic

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ جَعَلۡنَا فِي ٱلسَّمَآءِ بُرُوجٗا وَزَيَّنَّـٰهَا لِلنَّـٰظِرِينَ
verses.translit: Walaqad jaAAalna fee alssamai buroojan wazayyannaha lilnnathireena
verses.translation: And We have placed within the heaven great stars and have beautified it for the observers

verses.text: وَحَفِظۡنَٰهَا مِن كُلِّ شَيۡطَٰنٖ رَّجِيمٍ
verses.translit: Wahafithnaha min kulli shaytanin rajeemin
verses.translation: And We have protected it from every devil expelled [from the mercy of Allah]

verses.text: إِلَّا مَنِ ٱسۡتَرَقَ ٱلسَّمۡعَ فَأَتۡبَعَهُۥ شِهَابٞ مُّبِينٞ
verses.translit: Illa mani istaraqa alssamAAa faatbaAAahu shihabun mubeenun
verses.translation: Except one who steals a hearing and is pursued by a clear burning flame

verses.text: وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ مَدَدۡنَٰهَا وَأَلۡقَيۡنَا فِيهَا رَوَٰسِيَ وَأَنۢبَتۡنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ شَيۡءٖ مَّوۡزُونٖ
verses.translit: Waalarda madadnaha waalqayna feeha rawasiya waanbatna feeha min kulli shayin mawzoonin
verses.translation: And the earth - We have spread it and cast therein firmly set mountains and caused to grow therein [something] of every well-balanced thing

verses.text: وَجَعَلۡنَا لَكُمۡ فِيهَا مَعَٰيِشَ وَمَن لَّسۡتُمۡ لَهُۥ بِرَٰزِقِينَ
verses.translit: WajaAAalna lakum feeha maAAayisha waman lastum lahu biraziqeena
verses.translation: And We have made for you therein means of living and [for] those for whom you are not providers

verses.text: وَإِن مِّن شَيۡءٍ إِلَّا عِندَنَا خَزَآئِنُهُۥ وَمَا نُنَزِّلُهُۥٓ إِلَّا بِقَدَرٖ مَّعۡلُومٖ
verses.translit: Wain min shayin illa AAindana khazainuhu wama nunazziluhu illa biqadarin maAAloomin
verses.translation: And there is not a thing but that with Us are its depositories, and We do not send it down except according to a known measure

verses.text: وَأَرۡسَلۡنَا ٱلرِّيَٰحَ لَوَٰقِحَ فَأَنزَلۡنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗ فَأَسۡقَيۡنَٰكُمُوهُ وَمَآ أَنتُمۡ لَهُۥ بِخَٰزِنِينَ
verses.translit: Waarsalna alrriyaha lawaqiha faanzalna mina alssamai maan faasqaynakumoohu wama antum lahu bikhazineena
verses.translation: And We have sent the fertilizing winds and sent down water from the sky and given you drink from it. And you are not its retainers

verses.text: وَإِنَّا لَنَحۡنُ نُحۡيِۦ وَنُمِيتُ وَنَحۡنُ ٱلۡوَٰرِثُونَ
verses.translit: Wainna lanahnu nuhyee wanumeetu wanahnu alwarithoona
verses.translation: And indeed, it is We who give life and cause death, and We are the Inheritor

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ عَلِمۡنَا ٱلۡمُسۡتَقۡدِمِينَ مِنكُمۡ وَلَقَدۡ عَلِمۡنَا ٱلۡمُسۡتَـٔۡخِرِينَ
verses.translit: Walaqad AAalimna almustaqdimeena minkum walaqad AAalimna almustakhireena
verses.translation: And We have already known the preceding [generations] among you, and We have already known the later [ones to come]

verses.text: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ يَحۡشُرُهُمۡۚ إِنَّهُۥ حَكِيمٌ عَلِيمٞ
verses.translit: Wainna rabbaka huwa yahshuruhum innahu hakeemun AAaleemun
verses.translation: And indeed, your Lord will gather them; indeed, He is Wise and Knowing

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ خَلَقۡنَا ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ مِن صَلۡصَٰلٖ مِّنۡ حَمَإٖ مَّسۡنُونٖ
verses.translit: Walaqad khalaqna alinsana min salsalin min hamain masnoonin
verses.translation: And We did certainly create man out of clay from an altered black mud

verses.text: وَٱلۡجَآنَّ خَلَقۡنَٰهُ مِن قَبۡلُ مِن نَّارِ ٱلسَّمُومِ
verses.translit: Waaljanna khalaqnahu min qablu min nari alssamoomi
verses.translation: And the jinn We created before from scorching fire

verses.text: وَإِذۡ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلۡمَلَـٰٓئِكَةِ إِنِّي خَٰلِقُۢ بَشَرٗا مِّن صَلۡصَٰلٖ مِّنۡ حَمَإٖ مَّسۡنُونٖ
verses.translit: Waith qala rabbuka lilmalaikati innee khaliqun basharan min salsalin min hamain masnoonin
verses.translation: And [mention, O Muhammad], when your Lord said to the angels, "I will create a human being out of clay from an altered black mud

verses.text: فَإِذَا سَوَّيۡتُهُۥ وَنَفَخۡتُ فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِي فَقَعُواْ لَهُۥ سَٰجِدِينَ
verses.translit: Faitha sawwaytuhu wanafakhtu feehi min roohee faqaAAoo lahu sajideena
verses.translation: And when I have proportioned him and breathed into him of My [created] soul, then fall down to him in prostration

verses.text: فَسَجَدَ ٱلۡمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ كُلُّهُمۡ أَجۡمَعُونَ
verses.translit: Fasajada almalaikatu kulluhum ajmaAAoona
verses.translation: So the angels prostrated - all of them entirely

verses.text: إِلَّآ إِبۡلِيسَ أَبَىٰٓ أَن يَكُونَ مَعَ ٱلسَّـٰجِدِينَ
verses.translit: Illa ibleesa aba an yakoona maAAa alssajideena
verses.translation: Except Iblees, he refused to be with those who prostrated

verses.text: قَالَ يَـٰٓإِبۡلِيسُ مَا لَكَ أَلَّا تَكُونَ مَعَ ٱلسَّـٰجِدِينَ
verses.translit: Qala ya ibleesu ma laka alla takoona maAAa alssajideena
verses.translation: [Allah] said, O Iblees, what is [the matter] with you that you are not with those who prostrate

verses.text: قَالَ لَمۡ أَكُن لِّأَسۡجُدَ لِبَشَرٍ خَلَقۡتَهُۥ مِن صَلۡصَٰلٖ مِّنۡ حَمَإٖ مَّسۡنُونٖ
verses.translit: Qala lam akun liasjuda libasharin khalaqtahu min salsalin min hamain masnoonin
verses.translation: He said, "Never would I prostrate to a human whom You created out of clay from an altered black mud

verses.text: قَالَ فَٱخۡرُجۡ مِنۡهَا فَإِنَّكَ رَجِيمٞ
verses.translit: Qala faokhruj minha fainnaka rajeemun
verses.translation: [Allah] said, "Then get out of it, for indeed, you are expelled

verses.text: وَإِنَّ عَلَيۡكَ ٱللَّعۡنَةَ إِلَىٰ يَوۡمِ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.translit: Wainna AAalayka allaAAnata ila yawmi alddeeni
verses.translation: And indeed, upon you is the curse until the Day of Recompense

verses.text: قَالَ رَبِّ فَأَنظِرۡنِيٓ إِلَىٰ يَوۡمِ يُبۡعَثُونَ
verses.translit: Qala rabbi faanthirnee ila yawmi yubAAathoona
verses.translation: He said, "My Lord, then reprieve me until the Day they are resurrected

verses.text: قَالَ فَإِنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُنظَرِينَ
verses.translit: Qala fainnaka mina almunthareena
verses.translation: [Allah] said, "So indeed, you are of those reprieved

verses.text: إِلَىٰ يَوۡمِ ٱلۡوَقۡتِ ٱلۡمَعۡلُومِ
verses.translit: Ila yawmi alwaqti almaAAloomi
verses.translation: Until the Day of the time well-known

verses.text: قَالَ رَبِّ بِمَآ أَغۡوَيۡتَنِي لَأُزَيِّنَنَّ لَهُمۡ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَلَأُغۡوِيَنَّهُمۡ أَجۡمَعِينَ
verses.translit: Qala rabbi bima aghwaytanee laozayyinanna lahum fee alardi walaoghwiyannahum ajmaAAeena
verses.translation: [Iblees] said, "My Lord, because You have put me in error, I will surely make [disobedience] attractive to them on earth, and I will mislead them all

verses.text: إِلَّا عِبَادَكَ مِنۡهُمُ ٱلۡمُخۡلَصِينَ
verses.translit: Illa AAibadaka minhumu almukhlaseena
verses.translation: Except, among them, Your chosen servants

verses.text: قَالَ هَٰذَا صِرَٰطٌ عَلَيَّ مُسۡتَقِيمٌ
verses.translit: Qala hatha siratun AAalayya mustaqeemun
verses.translation: [Allah] said, "This is a path [of return] to Me [that is] straight

verses.text: إِنَّ عِبَادِي لَيۡسَ لَكَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ سُلۡطَٰنٌ إِلَّا مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ ٱلۡغَاوِينَ
verses.translit: Inna AAibadee laysa laka AAalayhim sultanun illa mani ittabaAAaka mina alghaweena
verses.translation: Indeed, My servants - no authority will you have over them, except those who follow you of the deviators

verses.text: وَإِنَّ جَهَنَّمَ لَمَوۡعِدُهُمۡ أَجۡمَعِينَ
verses.translit: Wainna jahannama lamawAAiduhum ajmaAAeena
verses.translation: And indeed, Hell is the promised place for them all

verses.text: لَهَا سَبۡعَةُ أَبۡوَٰبٖ لِّكُلِّ بَابٖ مِّنۡهُمۡ جُزۡءٞ مَّقۡسُومٌ
verses.translit: Laha sabAAatu abwabin likulli babin minhum juzon maqsoomun
verses.translation: It has seven gates; for every gate is of them a portion designated

verses.text: إِنَّ ٱلۡمُتَّقِينَ فِي جَنَّـٰتٖ وَعُيُونٍ
verses.translit: Inna almuttaqeena fee jannatin waAAuyoonin
verses.translation: Indeed, the righteous will be within gardens and springs

verses.text: ٱدۡخُلُوهَا بِسَلَٰمٍ ءَامِنِينَ
verses.translit: Odkhulooha bisalamin amineena
verses.translation: [Having been told], "Enter it in peace, safe [and secure]

verses.text: وَنَزَعۡنَا مَا فِي صُدُورِهِم مِّنۡ غِلٍّ إِخۡوَٰنًا عَلَىٰ سُرُرٖ مُّتَقَٰبِلِينَ
verses.translit: WanazaAAna ma fee sudoorihim min ghillin ikhwanan AAala sururin mutaqabileena
verses.translation: And We will remove whatever is in their breasts of resentment, [so they will be] brothers, on thrones facing each other

verses.text: لَا يَمَسُّهُمۡ فِيهَا نَصَبٞ وَمَا هُم مِّنۡهَا بِمُخۡرَجِينَ
verses.translit: La yamassuhum feeha nasabun wama hum minha bimukhrajeena
verses.translation: No fatigue will touch them therein, nor from it will they [ever] be removed

verses.text: ۞نَبِّئۡ عِبَادِيٓ أَنِّيٓ أَنَا ٱلۡغَفُورُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.translit: Nabbi AAibadee annee ana alghafooru alrraheemu
verses.translation: [O Muhammad], inform My servants that it is I who am the Forgiving, the Merciful

verses.text: وَأَنَّ عَذَابِي هُوَ ٱلۡعَذَابُ ٱلۡأَلِيمُ
verses.translit: Wa anna AAathabee huwa alAAathabu alaleemu
verses.translation: And that it is My punishment which is the painful punishment

verses.text: وَنَبِّئۡهُمۡ عَن ضَيۡفِ إِبۡرَٰهِيمَ
verses.translit: Wanabbihum AAan dayfi ibraheema
verses.translation: And inform them about the guests of Abraham

verses.text: إِذۡ دَخَلُواْ عَلَيۡهِ فَقَالُواْ سَلَٰمٗا قَالَ إِنَّا مِنكُمۡ وَجِلُونَ
verses.translit: Ith dakhaloo AAalayhi faqaloo salaman qala inna minkum wajiloona
verses.translation: When they entered upon him and said, "Peace." [Abraham] said, "Indeed, we are fearful of you

verses.text: قَالُواْ لَا تَوۡجَلۡ إِنَّا نُبَشِّرُكَ بِغُلَٰمٍ عَلِيمٖ
verses.translit: Qaloo la tawjal inna nubashshiruka bighulamin AAaleemin
verses.translation: [The angels] said, "Fear not. Indeed, we give you good tidings of a learned boy

verses.text: قَالَ أَبَشَّرۡتُمُونِي عَلَىٰٓ أَن مَّسَّنِيَ ٱلۡكِبَرُ فَبِمَ تُبَشِّرُونَ
verses.translit: Qala abashshartumoonee AAala an massaniya alkibaru fabima tubashshirooni
verses.translation: He said, "Have you given me good tidings although old age has come upon me? Then of what [wonder] do you inform

verses.text: قَالُواْ بَشَّرۡنَٰكَ بِٱلۡحَقِّ فَلَا تَكُن مِّنَ ٱلۡقَٰنِطِينَ
verses.translit: Qaloo bashsharnaka bialhaqqi fala takun mina alqaniteena
verses.translation: They said, "We have given you good tidings in truth, so do not be of the despairing

verses.text: قَالَ وَمَن يَقۡنَطُ مِن رَّحۡمَةِ رَبِّهِۦٓ إِلَّا ٱلضَّآلُّونَ
verses.translit: Qala waman yaqnatu min rahmati rabbihi illa alddalloona
verses.translation: He said, "And who despairs of the mercy of his Lord except for those astray

verses.text: قَالَ فَمَا خَطۡبُكُمۡ أَيُّهَا ٱلۡمُرۡسَلُونَ
verses.translit: Qala fama khatbukum ayyuha almursaloona
verses.translation: [Abraham] said, "Then what is your business [here], O messengers

verses.text: قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّآ أُرۡسِلۡنَآ إِلَىٰ قَوۡمٖ مُّجۡرِمِينَ
verses.translit: Qaloo inna orsilna ila qawmin mujrimeena
verses.translation: They said, "Indeed, we have been sent to a people of criminals

verses.text: إِلَّآ ءَالَ لُوطٍ إِنَّا لَمُنَجُّوهُمۡ أَجۡمَعِينَ
verses.translit: Illa ala lootin inna lamunajjoohum ajmaAAeena
verses.translation: Except the family of Lot; indeed, we will save them all

verses.text: إِلَّا ٱمۡرَأَتَهُۥ قَدَّرۡنَآ إِنَّهَا لَمِنَ ٱلۡغَٰبِرِينَ
verses.translit: Illa imraatahu qaddarna innaha lamina alghabireena
verses.translation: Except his wife." Allah decreed that she is of those who remain behind

verses.text: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ ءَالَ لُوطٍ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلُونَ
verses.translit: Falamma jaa ala lootin almursaloona
verses.translation: And when the messengers came to the family of Lot

verses.text: قَالَ إِنَّكُمۡ قَوۡمٞ مُّنكَرُونَ
verses.translit: Qala innakum qawmun munkaroona
verses.translation: He said, "Indeed, you are people unknown

verses.text: قَالُواْ بَلۡ جِئۡنَٰكَ بِمَا كَانُواْ فِيهِ يَمۡتَرُونَ
verses.translit: Qaloo bal jinaka bima kanoo feehi yamtaroona
verses.translation: They said, "But we have come to you with that about which they were disputing

verses.text: وَأَتَيۡنَٰكَ بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَإِنَّا لَصَٰدِقُونَ
verses.translit: Waataynaka bialhaqqi wainna lasadiqoona
verses.translation: And we have come to you with truth, and indeed, we are truthful

verses.text: فَأَسۡرِ بِأَهۡلِكَ بِقِطۡعٖ مِّنَ ٱلَّيۡلِ وَٱتَّبِعۡ أَدۡبَٰرَهُمۡ وَلَا يَلۡتَفِتۡ مِنكُمۡ أَحَدٞ وَٱمۡضُواْ حَيۡثُ تُؤۡمَرُونَ
verses.translit: Faasri biahlika biqitAAin mina allayli waittabiAA adbarahum wala yaltafit minkum ahadun waimdoo haythu tumaroona
verses.translation: So set out with your family during a portion of the night and follow behind them and let not anyone among you look back and continue on to where you are commanded

verses.text: وَقَضَيۡنَآ إِلَيۡهِ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلۡأَمۡرَ أَنَّ دَابِرَ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ مَقۡطُوعٞ مُّصۡبِحِينَ
verses.translit: Waqadayna ilayhi thalika alamra anna dabira haolai maqtooAAun musbiheena
verses.translation: And We conveyed to him [the decree] of that matter: that those [sinners] would be eliminated by early morning

verses.text: وَجَآءَ أَهۡلُ ٱلۡمَدِينَةِ يَسۡتَبۡشِرُونَ
verses.translit: Wajaa ahlu almadeenati yastabshiroona
verses.translation: And the people of the city came rejoicing

verses.text: قَالَ إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ ضَيۡفِي فَلَا تَفۡضَحُونِ
verses.translit: Qala inna haolai dayfee fala tafdahooni
verses.translation: [Lot] said, "Indeed, these are my guests, so do not shame me

verses.text: وَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَلَا تُخۡزُونِ
verses.translit: Waittaqoo Allaha wala tukhzooni
verses.translation: And fear Allah and do not disgrace me

verses.text: قَالُوٓاْ أَوَلَمۡ نَنۡهَكَ عَنِ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.translit: Qaloo awalam nanhaka AAani alAAalameena
verses.translation: They said, "Have we not forbidden you from [protecting] people

verses.text: قَالَ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ بَنَاتِيٓ إِن كُنتُمۡ فَٰعِلِينَ
verses.translit: Qala haolai banatee in kuntum faAAileena
verses.translation: [Lot] said, "These are my daughters - if you would be doers [of lawful marriage]

verses.text: لَعَمۡرُكَ إِنَّهُمۡ لَفِي سَكۡرَتِهِمۡ يَعۡمَهُونَ
verses.translit: LaAAamruka innahum lafee sakratihim yaAAmahoona
verses.translation: By your life, [O Muhammad], indeed they were, in their intoxication, wandering blindly

verses.text: فَأَخَذَتۡهُمُ ٱلصَّيۡحَةُ مُشۡرِقِينَ
verses.translit: Faakhathathumu alssayhatu mushriqeena
verses.translation: So the shriek seized them at sunrise

verses.text: فَجَعَلۡنَا عَٰلِيَهَا سَافِلَهَا وَأَمۡطَرۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ حِجَارَةٗ مِّن سِجِّيلٍ
verses.translit: FajaAAalna AAaliyaha safilaha waamtarna AAalayhim hijaratan min sijjeelin
verses.translation: And We made the highest part [of the city] its lowest and rained upon them stones of hard clay

verses.text: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَٰتٖ لِّلۡمُتَوَسِّمِينَ
verses.translit: Inna fee thalika laayatin lilmutawassimeena
verses.translation: Indeed in that are signs for those who discern

verses.text: وَإِنَّهَا لَبِسَبِيلٖ مُّقِيمٍ
verses.translit: Wainnaha labisabeelin muqeemin
verses.translation: And indeed, those cities are [situated] on an established road

verses.text: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗ لِّلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.translit: Inna fee thalika laayatan lilmumineena
verses.translation: Indeed in that is a sign for the believers

verses.text: وَإِن كَانَ أَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلۡأَيۡكَةِ لَظَٰلِمِينَ
verses.translit: Wain kana ashabu alaykati lathalimeena
verses.translation: And the companions of the thicket were [also] wrongdoers

verses.text: فَٱنتَقَمۡنَا مِنۡهُمۡ وَإِنَّهُمَا لَبِإِمَامٖ مُّبِينٖ
verses.translit: Faintaqamna minhum wainnahuma labiimamin mubeenin
verses.translation: So We took retribution from them, and indeed, both [cities] are on a clear highway

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ كَذَّبَ أَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلۡحِجۡرِ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
verses.translit: Walaqad kaththaba ashabu alhijri almursaleena
verses.translation: And certainly did the companions of Thamud deny the messengers

verses.text: وَءَاتَيۡنَٰهُمۡ ءَايَٰتِنَا فَكَانُواْ عَنۡهَا مُعۡرِضِينَ
verses.translit: Waataynahum ayatina fakanoo AAanha muAArideena
verses.translation: And We gave them Our signs, but from them they were turning away

verses.text: وَكَانُواْ يَنۡحِتُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡجِبَالِ بُيُوتًا ءَامِنِينَ
verses.translit: Wakanoo yanhitoona mina aljibali buyootan amineena
verses.translation: And they used to carve from the mountains, houses, feeling secure

verses.text: فَأَخَذَتۡهُمُ ٱلصَّيۡحَةُ مُصۡبِحِينَ
verses.translit: Faakhathathumu alssayhatu musbiheena
verses.translation: But the shriek seized them at early morning

verses.text: فَمَآ أَغۡنَىٰ عَنۡهُم مَّا كَانُواْ يَكۡسِبُونَ
verses.translit: Fama aghna AAanhum ma kanoo yaksiboona
verses.translation: So nothing availed them [from] what they used to earn

verses.text: وَمَا خَلَقۡنَا ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَآ إِلَّا بِٱلۡحَقِّۗ وَإِنَّ ٱلسَّاعَةَ لَأٓتِيَةٞۖ فَٱصۡفَحِ ٱلصَّفۡحَ ٱلۡجَمِيلَ
verses.translit: Wama khalaqna alssamawati waalarda wama baynahuma illa bialhaqqi wainna alssaAAata laatiyatun faisfahi alssafha aljameela
verses.translation: And We have not created the heavens and earth and that between them except in truth. And indeed, the Hour is coming; so forgive with gracious forgiveness

verses.text: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ ٱلۡخَلَّـٰقُ ٱلۡعَلِيمُ
verses.translit: Inna rabbaka huwa alkhallaqu alAAaleemu
verses.translation: Indeed, your Lord - He is the Knowing Creator

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ ءَاتَيۡنَٰكَ سَبۡعٗا مِّنَ ٱلۡمَثَانِي وَٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ ٱلۡعَظِيمَ
verses.translit: Walaqad ataynaka sabAAan mina almathanee waalqurana alAAatheema
verses.translation: And We have certainly given you, [O Muhammad], seven of the often repeated [verses] and the great Qur'an

verses.text: لَا تَمُدَّنَّ عَيۡنَيۡكَ إِلَىٰ مَا مَتَّعۡنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزۡوَٰجٗا مِّنۡهُمۡ وَلَا تَحۡزَنۡ عَلَيۡهِمۡ وَٱخۡفِضۡ جَنَاحَكَ لِلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.translit: La tamuddanna AAaynayka ila ma mattaAAna bihi azwajan minhum wala tahzan AAalayhim waikhfid janahaka lilmumineena
verses.translation: Do not extend your eyes toward that by which We have given enjoyment to [certain] categories of the disbelievers, and do not grieve over them. And lower your wing to the believers

verses.text: وَقُلۡ إِنِّيٓ أَنَا ٱلنَّذِيرُ ٱلۡمُبِينُ
verses.translit: Waqul innee ana alnnatheeru almubeenu
verses.translation: And say, "Indeed, I am the clear warner

verses.text: كَمَآ أَنزَلۡنَا عَلَى ٱلۡمُقۡتَسِمِينَ
verses.translit: Kama anzalna AAala almuqtasimeena
verses.translation: Just as We had revealed [scriptures] to the separators

verses.text: ٱلَّذِينَ جَعَلُواْ ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ عِضِينَ
verses.translit: Allatheena jaAAaloo alqurana AAideena
verses.translation: Who have made the Qur'an into portions

verses.text: فَوَرَبِّكَ لَنَسۡـَٔلَنَّهُمۡ أَجۡمَعِينَ
verses.translit: Fawarabbika lanasalannahum ajmaAAeena
verses.translation: So by your Lord, We will surely question them all

verses.text: عَمَّا كَانُواْ يَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.translit: AAamma kanoo yaAAmaloona
verses.translation: About what they used to do

verses.text: فَٱصۡدَعۡ بِمَا تُؤۡمَرُ وَأَعۡرِضۡ عَنِ ٱلۡمُشۡرِكِينَ
verses.translit: FaisdaAA bima tumaru waaAArid AAani almushrikeena
verses.translation: Then declare what you are commanded and turn away from the polytheists

verses.text: إِنَّا كَفَيۡنَٰكَ ٱلۡمُسۡتَهۡزِءِينَ
verses.translit: Inna kafaynaka almustahzieena
verses.translation: Indeed, We are sufficient for you against the mockers

verses.text: ٱلَّذِينَ يَجۡعَلُونَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا ءَاخَرَۚ فَسَوۡفَ يَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.translit: Allatheena yajAAaloona maAAa Allahi ilahan akhara fasawfa yaAAlamoona
verses.translation: Who make [equal] with Allah another deity. But they are going to know

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ نَعۡلَمُ أَنَّكَ يَضِيقُ صَدۡرُكَ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ
verses.translit: Walaqad naAAlamu annaka yadeequ sadruka bima yaqooloona
verses.translation: And We already know that your breast is constrained by what they say

verses.text: فَسَبِّحۡ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّكَ وَكُن مِّنَ ٱلسَّـٰجِدِينَ
verses.translit: Fasabbih bihamdi rabbika wakun mina alssajideena
verses.translation: So exalt [Allah] with praise of your Lord and be of those who prostrate [to Him]

verses.text: وَٱعۡبُدۡ رَبَّكَ حَتَّىٰ يَأۡتِيَكَ ٱلۡيَقِينُ
verses.translit: WaoAAbud rabbaka hatta yatiyaka alyaqeenu
verses.translation: And worship your Lord until there comes to you the certainty (death)
